props.name: items
props.description: List of items to display in the gallery. Each item should have an image URL and a text label.

props.name: bend
props.description: Determines the curvature of the gallery layout. A negative value bends in one direction, a positive value in the opposite.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Specifies the color of the text labels.

props.name: borderRadius
props.description: Sets the border radius for the media items to achieve rounded corners.

props.name: scrollSpeed
props.description: Controls how much the gallery moves per scroll event. Lower values result in slower scrolling, higher values in faster scrolling.

props.name: scrollEase
props.description: Controls the smoothness of scroll transitions. Lower values create smoother, more fluid motion, while higher values make it more responsive.
